---
title: "François-Pierre-Guillaume Guizot"
---

## François-Pierre-Guillaume Guizot

**Dates:** (4 Oct 1787-12 Sept 1874)

### Description

French statesman

### Letters

- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from Oct 14th [1895]
- Letter from Feb 12th 1885 
- Letter from 24 November 1877 
- Letter from May 7, 1874.
- Letter from Aug 5th 1871
- Letter from Decr 9th 1870
- Letter from Aug 28th [1869]
- Letter from August 14. [1869]
- Letter from August 13. [1869]
- Letter from August 12. [1869]
- Letter from August 11. [1869]
- Letter from August 10. [1869]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from August 5 [1869]
- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868
- Letter from Jan. 19. 1867
- Letter from Jany 17th [1867]

*... and 2 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
